song_name: We Cant Be Friends Wait For Your Love

versions.song_name: We Cant Be Friends Wait For Your Love

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: We Cant Be Friends Wait For Your Love

content:
Acoustic Version. Listen To The Song For
Strumming. Sounds Nice With A Slight Palm
Mute. Use Bar/Power Chords.
Dm - Off 5th Fret
C - Off 3rd Fret
Bb - Off 6th Fret
F - Off 1st
Am - Open

[Intro]
I didn't think you'd understand me

How could you ever even try?

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
I don't wanna tiptoe, but I don't wanna hide[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]Dm[/ch]
But I don't wanna feed this monstrous fire[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
Just wanna let this story die[/tab]

And I'll be alright

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
We can't be friends[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
But I'd like to just pretend[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
You cling to your papers and pens[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Wait until you like me again[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
Wait for your love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
Love, I'll wait for your love[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]Bb[/ch]  (*Pause*)
Me and my truth, we sit in silence[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                            [ch]Bb[/ch]
 Baby girl, it's just me and you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
 'Cause I don't wanna argue, but I don't wanna bite[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]Dm[/ch]
My tongue, yeah, I think I'd rather die[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]
You got me misunderstood, but at least I look this good[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
We can't be friends[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
But I'd like to just pretend[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
You cling to your papers and pens[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Wait until you like me again[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
Wait for your love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
Love, I'll wait for your love[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]
I'll wait for your love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
Love, I'll wait for your love[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Know that you made me[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
I don't like how you paint me, yet I'm still here hanging[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Not what you made me[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]
It's something like a daydream[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Dm[/ch]
But I feel so seen in the night[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
So for now, it's only me[/tab]

And maybe that's all I need

[Chorus]
(*only Vocals For This Next
Bit Until ‘wait For You Love’*)

We can't be friends[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]
But I'd like to just pretend[/tab]

You cling to your papers and pens[/tab]
